headline: ISIS Simp Gun Dealer BUSTED 💥🔫 in ODU Jihad Flop 😵
text:
Kenya Chapman 🧔💰, 32yo straw-purchasing SIMP 🤡, just got SLAPPED 🔒 with federal charges for slinging a STOLEN 🔫 from Newport News whip 🚗 to ISIS wannabe Mohamed Bailor Jalloh 🕌😈 – days before his Virginia ODU classroom jihad FAIL 💥😂! Jalloh, ex-National Guard bro 🪖 who did HARD TIME ⛓️ in 2017 for plotting Fort Hood 2.0 🎯💣 (13 dead vibes 😱), got BUSTED out in 2024 and yelled ALLAHU AKBAR 🕌📣 before spraying in ROTC class – but BADASS cadet HEROES 💪🪖 ROTC Rambo'd him DOWN 😤🔥, pinning the terrorist till he KEEL'D 😵 without a single bullet! No cap, FBI boss babe Dominique Evans 💅🕵️‍♀️ spilling: 'Brave ROTC CHADS 🧔‍♂️ saved the day, or WHO KNOWS what body count 📈💀!' 

Lt Col Brandon Shah 🪖😢, devoted ROTC daddy teaching service LIFE 🫡🇺🇸, got MERKED 💀 by the jihadi – Gov Abigail Spanberger 👩‍💼 heartbroken 💔: 'He led OTHERS to glory!' Two injured peeps 🤕 – one critical, one dipped from hospital 🏥🚪. Shooter strolled into Constant Hall biz school 📚🏢, asked 'ROTC? YES?' then BLAMMO 🔫💨 – cops rolled up to find him already PASTED 😵👻, thanks to student soldiers SLAYING 👊! 

Chapman facing LYING on gun buys 🤥🔫 + unlicensed dealing NO LICENSE 😤🚫 – stole that piece a year ago and FLIPPED to Jalloh like black market Uber Eats 🍔🔫! Jalloh's 2016 guilty plea? Dreaming of ISIS material support 💰🕌 for mass shooter glow-up like Nidal Hasan's Fort Hood RAMPAGE 🩸13️⃣. FBI probing as TERROR 🚨 cuz prior conviction + Allahu Akbar war cry 📣 – NO Iran war tea ☕🚫. 

FBI Director Kash Patel 🕵️‍♂️🔥 thanking 'BRAVE STUDENTS' 🫡 who 'SAVED LIVES' 💪❤️ + quick cop response 🚔⚡. Two vics were ARMY bros 🪖, per Sec Dan Driscoll 📢. Meanwhile, Michigan synagogue 🚙💥 ram into school same day – kids safe 🏃‍♂️👨‍👩‍👧‍👦, guard banged up but GOOD 😤. Gun runner Chapman CATCHING SMOKES 🚬😩 while ROTC LEGENDS 🦸‍♂️ get the W ‼️ – jihadjihad OWNED by American CHADS 🇺🇸💥!
